visual_analysis.description: A red and white soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located in the center of the shelf.
A green and silver soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, to the left of the red soda can.
An orange plastic bottle with a green cap, to the left of the green soda can.
A black soda can with white text, located behind the orange bottle.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, to the right of the red soda can.
A white and pink can with 'Milkis' written on it, to the right of the water bottle.
The wooden surface where all the drinks are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The user wants to drink Coca-Cola. The red soda can is clearly visible and directly accessible.
